Before creating anything, show me exactly what files would be generated if I create a Blazor Web App called MyBlazorApp in ./test-output with interactive server rendering. Don't actually create the project yet.

input.initialPrompt: Before creating anything, show me exactly what files would be generated if I create a Blazor Web App called MyBlazorApp in ./test-output with interactive server rendering. Don't actually create the project yet.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Dry-run Blazor Web App template with server interactivity

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Dry-run Blazor Web App template with server interactivity

data.reasoningText: The user wants to know what files would be generated by creating a Blazor Web App with interactive server rendering, without actually creating the project. I can use `dotnet new blazor --name MyBlazorApp --output ./test-output --interactivity Server --dry-run` to show what would be generated.

arguments.description: Dry-run Blazor Web App template with server interactivity

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new blazor --name MyBlazorApp --output ./test-output --interactivity Server --dry-run 2>&1", "description": "Dry-run Blazor Web App template with server interactivity", "initial_wait": 15}

toolArgs.description: Dry-run Blazor Web App template with server interactivity

data.content:
Here's what `dotnet new blazor --name MyBlazorApp --output ./test-output --interactivity Server` would generate:

**Project root:**
- `MyBlazorApp.csproj`, `Program.cs`
- `appsettings.json`, `appsettings.Development.json`
- `Properties/launchSettings.json`

**Components/ (Razor components):**
- `App.razor`, `Routes.razor`, `_Imports.razor`
- `Layout/` — `MainLayout`, `NavMenu`, `ReconnectModal` (each with `.razor` + `.razor.css`, reconnect also has `.razor.js`)
- `Pages/` — `Counter`, `Error`, `Home`, `NotFound`, `Weather`

**wwwroot/ (static assets):**
- `app.css`, `favicon.png`
- `lib/bootstrap/dist/` — full Bootstrap CSS + JS (16 CSS files, 8 JS files, with source maps)

A NuGet restore would also run automatically after creation. Total: **67 files**.
